name: First Round Shocks and Debutant Heroes
angle: The opening round of group games has thrown up the tournament's first big stories — headlined by Cabo Verde's 40-year-old goalkeeper Vozinha keeping out the European champions Spain on his World Cup debut for a 0-0 draw in Atlanta.

questions.question: World Cup debutants held the European champions to a goalless draw in the group stage. Which nation pulled off the shock?
Cabo Verde's man of the match against Spain was their 40-year-old goalkeeper. By what name is he known?
Vozinha's clean sheet made him the third-oldest goalkeeper to keep one in a men's World Cup match. He trails only which two greats?
Spain laid siege to the Cabo Verde goal without reward. Roughly how many shots did they register across the 90 minutes?
Spain arrived in the United States as the reigning champions of which competition?
Germany began their campaign with a 7-1 win over which World Cup debutants?
Curacao are the smallest nation by population ever to reach a men's World Cup. Whose record did they take?
Curacao were beaten 7-1 by Germany but still made history in the match. Why?

options.A: They scored their first ever World Cup goal
options.B: They became the smallest nation to win a point
options.C: They conceded the fastest goal in tournament history

questions.question: Scotland beat Haiti 1-0 for their first World Cup win since which year?
Who scored the only goal of Scotland's win over Haiti?
Scotland's victory was their first at a World Cup since a 2-1 win over which nation in 1990?
Australia produced one of the early upsets, winning 2-0 against which side?
Sweden made the biggest statement in Group F, thrashing which side 5-1?
Brazil were held to a 1-1 draw in their opening match by which African side?
In Group G, alongside Belgium 1-1 Egypt, Iran drew 2-2 with which side?
